docket_entries.description: ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE *FINAL CONTINUANCE*. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
ORDER OF CONTINUANCE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY TYAGLO, ALEXANDER AS TO DEFENDANT TRAKHTER, LENNY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-07-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-08-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUN-03-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ALEXANDER TYAGLO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LENNY TRAKHTER IS NOT PRESENT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK:RETURN MAIL RECD 5/19/22. SC-100 MAILED CERTIFIED TO LENNY TRAKHTER-NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED/MOVED.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-03-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-18-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ALEXANDER TYAGLO IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED UKRAINIAN INTERPRETER LUBA CHERNOV. DEFENDANT LENNY TRAKHTER IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-17-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE *FINAL CONTINUANCE* TO OCT-20-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ALEXANDER TYAGLO IS PRESENT AND ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED UKRAINIAN INTERPRETER VITALIY DENYSOV #301807. DEFENDANT LENNY TRAKHTER IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
REMARK:RETURN MAIL BY POST OFFICE MAY-31-2023 CONTINUE ORDER MAIL TO PLAINTIFF(ENVOLOPE MARKED:RETURN TO SENDER INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS UNABLE TO FORWARD)
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF. WRITTEN DECLARATION OF DEFENDANT, LENNY TRAKHTER, CURRENT ADDRESS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF TYAGLO, ALEXANDER
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE REMARKS: DOES NOT LIVE AT ADDRESS PER ADULT RESIDENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TYAGLO, ALEXANDER AS TO DEFENDANT TRAKHTER, LENNY
REMARK:RETURN MAIL RECD. CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO ALEXANDER TYAGLO-INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$150.00) SERVED OCT-21-2022, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT TRAKHTER, LENNY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-18-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAY-17-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. FINAL CONTINUANCE. NO FURTHER CONTINUANCES ARE ALLOWED. PLAINTIFF ALEXANDER TYAGLO IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY VITALY DENYSOV, COURT CERTIFIED UKRAINIAN INTERPERTER #301807. DEFENDANT LENNY TRAKHTER IS NOT PRESENT. COURT DETERMINES THAT THE PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON 10-27-22 IS DEFECTIVE AND SERVICE IS NOT VALID. DEFENDANTS ADDRESS ON PLAINTIFF'S CLIAM IS 515 CAPUCHINO DR, MILLBRAE CA 94030. SUBSTITUTE SERVICE WAS DONE AT 535 CAPUCHINO DR, MILLBRAE CA 94030 BY LEAVING WITH A PARTY LISTED AS "TENANT" WHICH IS NOT A VALID METHOD OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF NEEDS TO DETERMINE THAT CORRECT ADDRESS OF DEFENDANT FOR SERVICE. PLAINTIFF NEEDS TO UDPATE DEFENDANT'S CORRECT ADDRESS WITH THE COURT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.
NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM PANG LY, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TYAGLO, ALEXANDER ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF TYAGLO, ALEXANDER AS TO DEFENDANT TRAKHTER, LENNY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-07-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-08-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ALEXANDER TYAGLO IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF REQUEST UKRANINAN INTREPRETER AT NEXT HEARING. DEFENDANT LENNY TRAKHTER IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER - CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY THE PLAINTIFF.
